name.description: Name or identifier for this assertion
name.title: Name

value.description: Expected string, list of strings for contains_any/contains_all, or non-negative integer for min_length/max_length
value.title: Value

case_sensitive.description: Whether string matching should preserve case
case_sensitive.title: Case Sensitive

required.description: Whether this assertion must pass for assertions_passed to be true
required.title: Required

weight.description: Relative weight used to calculate assertion_score
weight.title: Weight

AssertionPolicyConfig.description: A reusable group of deterministic checks and pass thresholds.

checks.description: Assertions evaluated as one reusable policy
checks.title: Checks

AssertionPolicyConfig.title: AssertionPolicyConfig

AssertionType.description: Deterministic checks that can be applied to an agent response.
AssertionType.title: AssertionType

description.description: Description of what this criterion evaluates
description.title: Description

weight.description: Weight for this criterion in scoring
weight.title: Weight

rubric.description: Optional score anchors keyed by an exact score or inclusive range (e.g. '1', '2-3', '4-5'). Providing rubric anchors significantly improves inter-rater reliability across different juror models (G-Eval, Liu et al. 2023).
rubric.title: Rubric

DatasetItemConfig.description: One row in an inline config dataset.

input.description: Prompt sent to the agent; accepts 'prompt' as an input alias
input.title: Input

DatasetItemConfig.title: DatasetItemConfig

name.description: Name or identifier for this juror
name.title: Name

model_name.description: LLM model override. Must be set together with api_key and provider to override the jury-level llm_provider.
model_name.title: Model Name

provider.description: LLM provider override. Must be set together with model_name and api_key.

api_key.description: API key override. Must be set together with model_name and provider. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.
api_key.title: Api Key

base_url.description: Optional base URL when this juror fully overrides llm_provider. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation. Not used for anthropic.
base_url.title: Base Url

system_prompt.description: Custom system prompt for this juror
system_prompt.title: System Prompt

provider.description: LLM provider. 'openai_compatible' works with OpenAI, OpenRouter, xAI, Gemini, Ollama, vLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. 'anthropic' uses the Anthropic API directly (requires openjury[anthropic]).

model_name.description: LLM model identifier for this provider
model_name.title: Model Name

api_key.description: API key for this provider. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.
api_key.title: Api Key

base_url.description: Optional base URL for openai_compatible providers. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation. Not used for anthropic.
base_url.title: Base Url

description.description: Description of what this jury evaluates
description.title: Description

llm_provider.description: Default LLM provider settings for jurors that do not fully override with their own model_name, api_key, and provider.

assertions.description: Reusable assertion policies keyed by IDs referenced from dataset rows. Legacy assertion lists are normalized to a policy named 'default'.
assertions.title: Assertions

dataset.description: Inline dataset represented as an array of JSON row objects
dataset.title: Dataset

assertion_threshold.description: Legacy default assertion threshold. New configs should set this on each named AssertionPolicyConfig.
assertion_threshold.title: Assertion Threshold

quality_threshold.description: Legacy default quality threshold. New configs should set this on each named AssertionPolicyConfig.
quality_threshold.title: Quality Threshold

score_scale.description: Global maximum score for all criteria
score_scale.title: Score Scale

score_min.description: Global minimum score; set to 0 to enable zero scores
score_min.title: Score Min

num_trials.description: Number of times to call the agent per prompt. num_trials=1 (default): single quality evaluation. num_trials>1: consistency audit — measures how reliably the agent produces similar-quality responses. Quality score always comes from trial 1.
num_trials.title: Num Trials

custom_scoring_function.description: Name of a ScoringFunction registered via ScoreAggregator.register(). When set, an additional 'custom' metric is computed alongside the canned metrics.
custom_scoring_function.title: Custom Scoring Function

max_retries.description: Max retries for failed juror calls
max_retries.title: Max Retries

evaluation_template.description: Optional override for the evaluation prompt template. Must include placeholders: prompt, response, criteria, score_min, score_scale, example_criterion_name, references_section, case_rules_section.
evaluation_template.title: Evaluation Template
